For many were led astray by them, And mighty men of valour stumbled by them from of old [and until this day].

9-13 The theme of these five verses is that the Lord does not approve of the military alliances which the kingdoms of Israel and Judah are making. The Lord has taught them in the past to trust in Him. He has even fought their battles. In a battle between the children of Israel and the Amorites ‘the Lord discomfited them before Israel, and slew them with a great slaughter at Gibeon…the Lord cast…

10:12. Then spake Joshua to the Lord in the day when the Lord delivered up the Amorites before the children of Israel, and he said in the sight of Israel, Sun, stand thou still upon Gibeon, and thou Moon, in the valley of Ajalon. Josh. 10:13. And the sun stood still, and the moon stayed, until the people had avenged themselves of their enemies. Is not this written in the book of Jasher? So the…

matches.lb: Quoting Commentary: Haamek Davar on Genesis, Introduction to Genesis 1
matches.x: This Book commonly known as The Book of Bereishis, is referred to by the Prophets as Sefer HaYashar, the Book of the Upright, as stated in Tractate Avodah Zarah 25a pertaining to the two [following] verses:1. “And the sun stood still, and the moon stayed, until the people had avenged themselves upon their enemies. Is this not written in the Sefer HaYashar?”1Josh. 10:13.This verse refers to the…
